actions.description: Documented current design system — all color tokens, typography, spacing, border-radius, transitions, component inventory, and identified gaps (no CSS variables, no responsive breakpoints, no touch support, no focus styles).

Researched mobile touch support. Current games are keyboard-only and unplayable on mobile. Proposed touch D-pad overlay that synthesizes keydown events, plus canvas scaling. Referenced itch.io, RetroArch, and Chrome dino game patterns.

ceoDirectiveStatus: Completed both parts: styleguide documentation and mobile touch research.
nextStep: Design phase — create design doc for mobile touch overlay with ASCII mockups and exact CSS/HTML spec.
